pkgmetadata.longdescription: Installs installkernel hooks that regenerate a marked region of limine.conf whenever a kernel is installed or removed. Kernel entries are derived from /lib/modules cross-referenced with the kernel image and initramfs in /boot. Mirrors how sys-boot/lilo ships its own installkernel hooks (postinst.d / postrm.d / install.d). On the traditional (non-systemd) installkernel path, which has no removal phase, a Portage postrm hook bridges kernel removal.
